body:
## Wave 8 — End-to-End Dry Run

Proves Dealix is not just "files that exist" but a system that **flows** from
first lead to first Proof Pack, on a fictional customer, with **zero real
external action**.

### E2E dry run
`scripts/run_dealix_e2e_dry_run.py` simulates 10 stages and writes
`reports/verification/e2e_dry_run_latest.md`:

| Stage | Result |
| --- | --- |
| 1 Target | PASS |
| 2 Outreach Approval (founder approval required, none auto-sent) | PASS |
| 3 Diagnostic | PASS |
| 4 Offer | PASS |
| 5 Paid Sprint Simulation (`SIMULATED-PAID` only — no real charge) | PASS |
| 6 Customer Workspace (12-file set) | PASS |
| 7 Proof Pack (skeleton — no fabricated result) | PASS |
| 8 Upsell | PASS |
| 9 Founder Daily Command | PASS |
| 10 Governance | PASS |

**Verdict: Private Launch Ready** (all core stages PASS).

### Private launch readiness score
`scripts/verify_dealix_launch_readiness.py` → P0/P1/P2 weighted score out of
100, writes `reports/launch/private_launch_readiness.md`.

**Score: 100/100 → Public Limited Ready.** No P0 blockers. (A P0 gap caps the
verdict at *Internal Only* regardless of score.)

### First revenue board
- `reports/revenue/first_revenue_plan.md` — the ladder + path to first riyal.
- `reports/revenue/first_revenue_board.md` — owner / status / next action / due.
- `reports/founder/daily_command.md` — the one screen to run the day.

### No External Action gate
`docs/03_governance/NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md` defines action
levels **A0–A5** and maps email / WhatsApp / LinkedIn / website / customer
reports / payment links / public case studies / GitHub actions onto them.
Enforced via the per-customer Approval Register, the dry run, the readiness
verifier, and the CI gate.

### Customer workspace test ("fake client")
`scripts/create_customer_workspace.py --name "dry-run-client"` scaffolds the
full Command Sprint set from `customers/_template/` (00_intake → 11_upsell).
Refuses to overwrite an existing folder unless `--force`. Generated customer
folders are **gitignored** (PII hygiene); only `_template/` is tracked.

### Launch gates workflow
`.github/workflows/dealix-launch-gates.yml` runs the four verifiers + the dry
run. `permissions: contents: read` only, no secrets, no write scopes.

### Verification results (local)
```
E2E_DRY_RUN_VERDICT=Private Launch Ready
LAUNCH_READINESS_SCORE=100  → Public Limited Ready
DEALIX_POSITIONING_OK=true
DEALIX_MODULE_STATUS_OK=true
DEALIX_GROWTH_ASSETS_OK=true
```
`npm run build` is non-blocking (`|| true`): there is no root `package.json`;
the frontend build lives in `frontend/` and is out of scope for this gate.

### Non-negotiables honored
No real external send · no fake proof presented as real · no guaranteed
revenue · no published customer name · no WhatsApp/LinkedIn automation · all
customer-facing/external actions remain approval-required.

### Blockers
None for private launch. Next: shortlist top 10 targets, approve ≤5 outreach
drafts (manual send only), book the first diagnostic.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_012RrMvzGwxmPfvnAYJ99Kk2)_

commits.messageBody:
Wave 8 proves the full revenue path flows end to end on a fictional
customer — target → outreach approval → diagnostic → offer → paid
sprint (simulated) → customer workspace → proof pack → upsell →
founder daily command — with zero real external action.

Adds:
- scripts/run_dealix_e2e_dry_run.py — 10-stage PASS/FAIL dry run + report
- scripts/create_customer_workspace.py — 12-file Command Sprint workspace
- scripts/verify_dealix_launch_readiness.py — P0/P1/P2 score out of 100
- scripts/verify_dealix_{positioning,module_status,growth_assets}.py
- scripts/_wave8_scan.py — claim/auto-send scanner with prohibition look-back
- customers/_template/ — canonical Command Sprint file set
- docs/03_governance/NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md — A0–A5 gate
- docs/governance/registers/CLAIMS_REGISTER.md
- .github/workflows/dealix-launch-gates.yml — read-only verify gate
- reports + outreach seed data

Honors the non-negotiables: no real external send, no fake proof, no
guaranteed revenue, no published customer name, no WhatsApp/LinkedIn
automation, approval-required for all customer-facing/external actions.
Generated customer workspaces stay gitignored (PII hygiene).
commits.messageHeadline: ops: add Dealix Wave 8 e2e dry run and first revenue readiness
fix: document best-effort UTF-8 reconfigure except (CodeQL empty-except)

title: ops: Dealix Wave 8 — E2E Dry Run + First Revenue Readiness
